UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile with personalized information for the Synapse Pakistan AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

language.description: User's preferred language (e.g., English, Urdu, Roman Urdu).

interests.description: User's interests, stored as an array of strings.

lastInteraction.description: Date and time of the user's last interaction with the AI.

memoryNotes.description: Additional notes about the user's preferences, goals, or past queries.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a single chat session with a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this chat.

title.description: A short title for the chat, usually from the first message.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the chat was created.

lastMessageTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the last message in the chat.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message in a chat.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID is the user's Firebase Auth UID.

/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}.description: Stores metadata for chat sessions. Messages are stored in a `messages` subcollection within each chat document.
